html:
This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival

BeginnerStandardExpertCustom

When placing a non-custom Mini-Golf Kit, a Mini-Golf Mat with several pre-defined pieces will appear. Each level of Mini-Golf Kit has 4 variations. Player can use the Pitchfork to remove the Mini-Golf Mat and all pieces placed on it.

When placing a custom Mini-Golf Kit, a custom Mini-Golf Mat appears, along with a Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit and a Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit.

Destroying any piece with the Hammer will cause the Mini-Golf Mat to be considered as custom. While standing on the custom Mini-Golf Mat, the Custom Course Shack Filter is available.

Player cannot place any structures on the Mini-Golf Mat.

Contents

  • 1 Mini-Golf Ball Dropper
  • 2 Mini-Golf Flaghole
  • 3 Mini-Golf Boundary Fence
  • 4 Putter
  • 5 Golf Ball
  • 6 Trivia
  • 7 Assets
    • 7.1 Mini-Golf Ball Dropper
    • 7.2 Mini-Golf Boundary Fence
  • 8 Gallery

Mini-Golf Ball Dropper

Golf Tee KitGolf Tee (generic)PlayingInactive

The Mini-Golf Ball Dropper is a structure used to start a game of mini-golf by inserting a Cawnival Token. Once started, it drops a Golf Ball and a Putter. While the mini-game is active, the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper emits light.

If the player takes too long to finish, the mini-game automatically ends, causing the Golf Ball and Putter to disappear.

When the Golf Ball goes into a Mini-Golf Flaghole, the mini-game ends. The Golf Ball and Putter disappear, and the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper dispenses a prize based on how the player's number of strokes compares to the displayed par:

  • Fewer strokes than par:
  • Exactly par:
  • More strokes than par:
  • Custom Mini-Golf: refund a Cawnival Token.

When placed on a custom Mini-Golf Mat, the number displayed on Mini-Golf Ball Dropper can be adjusted by the player.

The Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit can only be placed on a custom Mini-Golf Mat. If a player carries it away from the mat, it is automatically teleported back onto the Mini-Golf Mat.

Mini-Golf Flaghole

Golf Hole KitGolf Hole

If Golf Ball dropped in to Mini-Golf Flaghole the mini-game will end, Golf Ball with Putter will disappear and Mini-Golf Ball Dropper will drop a prize.

If mini-game is on, it will emits light.

Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit can place Mini-Golf Flaghole only on custom Mini-Golf Mat. If player will run away from custom Mini-Golf Mat with Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit it will teleported back in to Mini-Golf Mat.

Mini-Golf Boundary Fence

Putter

The Putter is an item that drops from Mini-Golf Ball Dropper and will disappear after the mini-game ends.

Players can equip it in the hand slot. They can use it to hit a Golf Ball.

When a player right-clicks the ball while holding the Putter, they run toward the ball and stand in position.

A small marker will appear in the standing position indicating the direction the player can hit the ball. This direction depends on which direction the player approaches the ball from.

The player can use the cursor to move the pointer, which indicates where the ball will be hit. If the cursor moves outside the marker, the pointer will jiggle.

Right-clicking will cause the ball to be hit with a gentle force.

While in a standing position, the player can hold the right-click button to increase the force. The longer the press, the greater the force. Consequently, the maximum force is limited.

Left-clicking will cause you to exit the standing position.

Once the ball is hit, it will fly in the indicated direction.

Golf Ball

If Golf Ball is dropped into the Mini-Golf Flaghole the mini-game will end, the Golf Ball and Putter will disappear, and the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper will drop a prize.

Golf Ball can be hit with different amounts of force by Putter.

Some elements work as colliders for it. For most obstacles, the ball can fly over, especially Pop-up Blockers or Springboards.

If the Golf Ball flies over Mini-Golf Boundary Fence outward the mat, it will teleport back to the position from which it was hit last time.

Trivia

  • The Mini Golf game and its items were introduced in 2026 Midsummer Cawnival event.

Assets

Mini-Golf Ball Dropper

  • On
  • When Flaghole is not placed
  • burnt (unused)

Mini-Golf Boundary Fence

  • Old idle
  • Old idle
  • Old hit
  • Old hit
  • Old place
  • Old place

Gallery

  • Unused Golf Ball inventory icon

“A course of middling difficulty.”
–Wickerbottom
“Something for the casual duffer.”
–Woodie
“Should make for a decent round.”

“Neither gentle meadöw, nör cruel gauntlet.”
–Wigfrid
“This one is juuuuust right!”
–Webber
“Medium! Just the way I like it!”
–Warly
“Middle friend”
–Wormwood
“It should be manageable.”
–Winona
“Good stuff, not too tough!”
–Wortox
“Me beat anyone. Me best!”
–Wurt

–Walter
“Nothing too fancy.”
–Wanda
“This may require more calculation.”
–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang
“Not for the faint of heart.”
–Wendy
“HARD MODE... FOR FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“For those up for a challenge.”
–Wickerbottom
“Ooh, tricky... no, I have not been golfing all day, Lucy.”

“Difficult? Let's see about that.”
–Maxwell
“I stand unshaken beföre any cöntest, nö matter höw arduöus.”

“We're up for a challenge!”

“Now we are spicing things up!”

“Tricky friend”

“This one might get tricky.”
–Winona
“What the putt?!”
–Wortox
“Hard one? Glorp! Me still win.”
–Wurt
“This will be a tricky one, Woby! But we can do it!”
–Walter
“Seems we are getting a little fancy.”
–Wanda
“Hm, there must be a formula to the perfect mini-golf course.”
–Wilson
“I'm making the hardest course ever.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang make own course!”
–Wolfgang
“What should we do, Abigail?”
–Wendy
“CUSTOM COURSE GENERATOR”
–WX-78
“One may use this to create a custom, and hopefully delightful, mini-golf course.”
–Wickerbottom
“Finally, my own mini- c'mon, Luce! I have other talents!”
–Woodie
“A course of my own conjuring?”
–Maxwell
“A warriör charts her öwn cöurse!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll make our very own mini-golf course!”
–Webber
“If I don't arrange it the same as before, will the outcome be different?”
–Warly
“Make special friend!”
–Wormwood
“One Winona special, comin' right up!”
–Winona
“It shall be a design of mine!”
–Wortox
“Me make best one.”
–Wurt
“I can't wait to play our very own custom mini-golf course, Woby!”
–Walter
“I've designed this course before.”
–Wanda

The Putter is an item that drops from Mini-Golf Ball Dropper and will disappear after the mini-game ends.
Players can equip it in the hand slot. They can use it to hit a Golf Ball.
When a player right-clicks the ball while holding the Putter, they run toward the ball and stand in position.
A small marker will appear in the standing position indicating the direction the player can hit the ball. This direction depends on which direction the player approaches the ball from.
The player can use the cursor to move the pointer, which indicates where the ball will be hit. If the cursor moves outside the marker, the pointer will jiggle.
Right-clicking will cause the ball to be hit with a gentle force.
While in a standing position, the player can hold the right-click button to increase the force. The longer the press, the greater the force. Consequently, the maximum force is limited.
Left-clicking will cause you to exit the standing position.
Once the ball is hit, it will fly in the indicated direction.

If Golf Ball is dropped into the Mini-Golf Flaghole the mini-game will end, the Golf Ball and Putter will disappear, and the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper will drop a prize.
Golf Ball can be hit with different amounts of force by Putter.
Some elements work as colliders for it. For most obstacles, the ball can fly over, especially Pop-up Blockers or Springboards.
If the Golf Ball flies over Mini-Golf Boundary Fence outward the mat, it will teleport back to the position from which it was hit last time.

The Mini Golf game and its items were introduced in 2026 Midsummer Cawnival event.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khi đặt Bộ dụng cụ chơi gôn mini không tùy chỉnh, một tấm thảm chơi gôn mini với một số mảnh được xác định trước sẽ xuất hiện. Mỗi cấp độ của Mini-Golf Kit có 4 biến thể. Người chơi có thể sử dụng Chĩa để tháo Thảm chơi gôn mini và tất cả các quân cờ được đặt trên đó.

But we can do it! |wanda = Seems we are getting a little fancy. |choose = wilson }} |-| Custom= {{Quotes |wilson = Hm, there must be a formula to the perfect mini-golf course. |willow = I'm making the hardest course ever. |wolfgang = Wolfgang make own course! |wendy = What should we do, Abigail? |wx78 = CUSTOM COURSE GENERATOR |wickerbottom = One may use this to create a custom, and hopefully delightful, mini-golf course. |woodie = Finally, my own mini- c'mon, Luce! I have other talents! |maxwell = A course of my own conjuring? |wigfrid = A warriör charts her öwn cöurse! |webber = We'll make our very own mini-golf course! |winona = One Winona special, comin' right up! |warly = If I don't arrange it the same as before, will the outcome be different? |wortox = It shall be a design of mine! |wormwood = Make special friend! |wurt = Me make best one. |walter = I can't wait to play our very own custom mini-golf course, Woby! |wanda = I've designed this course before. |choose = wilson }} When placing a non-custom '''Mini-Golf Kit''', a '''Mini-Golf Mat''' with several pre-defined pieces will appear. Each level of Mini-Golf Kit has 4 variations. Player can use the [[Pitchfork]] to remove the Mini-Golf Mat and all pieces placed on it. When placing a custom Mini-Golf Kit, a custom Mini-Golf Mat appears, along with a '''Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit''' and a '''Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit'''. Destroying any piece with the [[Hammer]] will cause the Mini-Golf Mat to be considered as custom. While standing on the custom '''Mini-Golf Mat''', the [[Custom Course Shack Filter]] is available. Player cannot place any structures on the Mini-Golf Mat. __TOC__{{clear}} == Mini-Golf Ball Dropper == {{Object Infobox |name = Mini-Golf Ball Dropper |image = Mini-Golf Ball Dropper.png |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golf_tee" }} {{Object Infobox |name = Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit |image = Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit Dropped.png |icon = Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit.png |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golf_tee_kit" }} |-|Golf Tee Kit= {{Quotes |wilson = Where to begin? |willow = Let's find a spot already. The course is missing something! |wolfgang = Wolfgang need to finish set up course first. |wendy = The course is incomplete. Like me. |wx78 = MISSING COMPONENT: FLAGHOLE |wickerbottom = The mini-golf course requires at least a flaghole to be playable. |woodie = The course needs a flaghole still. |maxwell = Ugh! The course is unfinished! |wigfrid = This arena awaiteth its cömpletiön! |webber = We think it's missing the flaghole still! |winona = The course ain't set up yet! |warly = It's missing the key ingredient! The flaghole! |wortox = Can't compete until the course is complete! |wormwood = Friend not finished |wurt = Glurph! What missing?! |walter = We can't play until there's a flaghole, Woby! |wanda = Oh botheration, I've forgotten the flaghole, haven't I? |choose = wendy }} The '''Mini-Golf Ball Dropper''' is a structure used to start a game of mini-golf by inserting a [[Cawnival Token]]. Once started, it drops a '''Golf Ball''' and a '''Putter'''. While the mini-game is active, the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper emits light. If the player takes too long to finish, the mini-game automatically ends, causing the Golf Ball and Putter to disappear. When the Golf Ball goes into a Mini-Golf Flaghole, the mini-game ends. The Golf Ball and Putter disappear, and the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper dispenses a prize based on how the player's number of strokes compares to the displayed par: * Fewer strokes than par: * Exactly par: * More strokes than par: * Custom Mini-Golf: refund a Cawnival Token. When placed on a custom Mini-Golf Mat, the number displayed on Mini-Golf Ball Dropper can be adjusted by the player. The Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Kit can only be placed on a custom Mini-Golf Mat. If a player carries it away from the mat, it is automatically teleported back onto the Mini-Golf Mat. {{clear}} == Mini-Golf Flaghole == {{Object Infobox |name = Mini-Golf Flaghole |image = Mini-Golf Flaghole.png |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golf_hole" }} {{Object Infobox |name = Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit |image = Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit Dropped.png |icon = Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit.png |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golf_hole_kit" }} |-|Golf Hole Kit= {{Quotes |wilson = Where to end? |willow = Let's not make it too easy. |wolfgang = Where Wolfgang put flaghole? |wendy = Let's put the end further away... |wx78 = DESTINATION POINT |wickerbottom = The flaghole should be positioned sufficiently far from the start to provide an appropriate challenge. |woodie = Let's just put it somewhere fair. |maxwell = Obviously it belongs at the end. |wigfrid = I shall decide the ball's destiny! |webber = Can we put it next to the start? |winona = Where should we put the ol' flaghole? |warly = Where shall we end? |wortox = It depends on where it ends. |wormwood = Where end friend? |wurt = Me choose where finish. |walter = Where should the flaghole go, Wobes? |wanda = I've seen where this game ends. |choose = wanda }} |-|Golf Hole= {{Quotes |wilson = I'll putt the ball right in there. |willow = Easy target. |wolfgang = What was that about bogey-man? |wendy = Aww cute, it's like a mini abyss. |wx78 = OBJECTIVE IDENTIFIED |wickerbottom = The objective of the game is to deposit the ball into that hole with as few strokes as possible. |woodie = Yes, Lucy. I counted every stroke. |maxwell = Child's play, but I don't feel bad about winning. |wigfrid = 'Tis already waving the flag öf surrender! |webber = We can do it! |winona = I've been known to sink a putt or two. |warly = The ball is delivered here! |wortox = The small ball shall fall! |wormwood = Ball friend go here |wurt = Me win! Me always win! Florp! |walter = And this is where the ball goes, Woby! |wanda = Haven't I played this hole already? |choose = wickerbottom }} If '''Golf Ball''' dropped in to '''Mini-Golf Flaghole''' the mini-game will end, '''Golf Ball''' with '''Putter''' will disappear and Mini-Golf Ball Dropper will drop a prize. If mini-game is on, it will emits light. '''Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit''' can place '''Mini-Golf Flaghole''' only on custom '''Mini-Golf Mat'''. If player will run away from custom '''Mini-Golf Mat''' with '''Mini-Golf Flaghole Kit''' it will teleported back in to '''Mini-Golf Mat'''. {{clear}} ==Mini-Golf Boundary Fence== {{clear}} == Putter == {{Object Infobox |name = Putter |image = Putter Dropped.png |icon = Putter.png |equipslot = hands |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golfclub" }} {{Quotes |wilson = Putter up! |willow = I can't wait to whack that ball! |wolfgang = Is puny club but Wolfgang make it work. |wendy = This will do the job. |wx78 = MINIMAL ENERGY INPUT REQUIRED FOR SUCCESSFUL OPERATION |wickerbottom = Essentially an instrument optimized for low-velocity kinetic transfer. |woodie = Don't tell me you're jealous of a putter, Lucy. |maxwell = Is this even a regulation putter? |wigfrid = A weapön öf precisiön, nöt brute förce. |webber = Just a little tap and off the ball goes! |winona = My trusty putter. |warly = A gentle instrument! |wortox = Tap it light, send it right... or out of sight! |wormwood = Gentle hit ball friend |wurt = Why not swing hard? |walter = It's all about control, see? Not power. Just careful aim, steady hands and good attitude! |wanda = If only everything required a little adjustment to set it right. |choose = wigfrid }} The '''Putter''' is an item that drops from '''Mini-Golf Ball Dropper''' and will disappear after the mini-game ends. Players can equip it in the hand slot. They can use it to hit a '''Golf Ball'''. When a player right-clicks the ball while holding the '''Putter''', they run toward the ball and stand in position. A small marker will appear in the standing position indicating the direction the player can hit the ball. This direction depends on which direction the player approaches the ball from. The player can use the cursor to move the pointer, which indicates where the ball will be hit. If the cursor moves outside the marker, the pointer will jiggle. Right-clicking will cause the ball to be hit with a gentle force. While in a standing position, the player can hold the right-click button to increase the force. The longer the press, the greater the force. Consequently, the maximum force is limited. Left-clicking will cause you to exit the standing position. Once the ball is hit, it will fly in the indicated direction. {{clear}} == Golf Ball == {{Object Infobox |name = Golf Ball |image = Golf Ball Dropped.png |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "carnivalgame_golfball" }} {{Quotes |wilson = I've seen you round here! |willow = Whose face should I imagine on it? |wolfgang = Sorry if Wolfgang swing too mighty, little ball. |wendy = It never chooses where it goes. Few things do. |wx78 = OPTIMIZED FOR ROLLING BEHAVIOR |wickerbottom = A near-perfect sphere, optimized for predictable rolling dynamics. |woodie = No, you may not, Luce. |maxwell = So small and obedient. It goes where I direct it. |wigfrid = Let it röll förth intö glöry! |webber = Don't worry little ball! We'll get you to the hole! |winona = Built to roll. |warly = Look at those cute little dimples! |wortox = Roll and roam, far from home! |wormwood = Sorry, ball friend |wurt = Me hit! |walter = Remember not to chase this ball, Woby! |wanda = Always rolling toward its next mistake. |choose = maxwell }} If '''Golf Ball''' is dropped into the '''Mini-Golf Flaghole''' the mini-game will end, the '''Golf Ball''' and '''Putter''' will disappear, and the Mini-Golf Ball Dropper will drop a prize. '''Golf Ball''' can be hit with different amounts of force by '''Putter'''. Some elements work as colliders for it. For most obstacles, the ball can fly over, especially [[Pop-up Blocker]]s or [[Springboard]]s. If the '''Golf Ball''' flies over '''Mini-Golf Boundary Fence''' outward the mat, it will teleport back to the position from which it was hit last time. {{clear}} == {{Trivia}} Trivia == * The Mini Golf game and its items were introduced in 2026 Midsummer Cawnival event. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == ===Mini-Golf Ball Dropper=== Mini-Golf Ball Dropper On.png|On Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Inactive.png|When Flaghole is not placed Mini-Golf Ball Dropper Burnt.png|burnt (unused) ===Mini-Golf Boundary Fence=== Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old Build.png|Old idle Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old 90 Build.png|Old idle Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old Hit.gif|Old hit Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old 90 Hit.gif|Old hit Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old Place.gif|Old place Mini-Golf Boundary Fence Old 90 Place.gif|Old place == {{pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Golf Ball.png|Unused Golf Ball inventory icon {{Craftable Items and Structures on DST}}
